1996: export async function createWorkspaceDeployment(
1997:   db: D1Database,
1998:   input: CreateWorkspaceDeploymentInput
1999: ): Promise<{ deployment: WorkspaceDeploymentResponse; reused: boolean }> {
2000:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2001:   const acceptedHashes = new Set([input.requestPayloadSha256, ...(input.requestPayloadSha256Aliases ?? [])]);
2002:   const existingIdempotency = await db
2003:     .prepare(
2004:       `SELECT deployment_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2005:        FROM workspace_deployment_idempotency
2006:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2007:        LIMIT 1`
2008:     )
2009:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2010:     .first<{ deployment_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2011: 
2012:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
2013:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256)) {
2014:       throw new WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2015:     }
2016: 
2017:     const existingDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.deployment_id);
2018:     if (!existingDeployment) {
2019:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing deployment ${existingIdempotency.deployment_id}`);
2020:     }
2021: 
2022:     return { deployment: existingDeployment, reused: true };
2023:   }
2024: 
2025:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
2026:     await db
2027:       .prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployment_idempotency WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?')
2028:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2029:       .run();
2030:   }
2031: 
2032:   const idempotencyWindowStart = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2033:   const existingDeploymentByKey = await db
2034:     .prepare(
2035:       `SELECT *
2036:        FROM workspace_deployments
2037:        WHERE workspace_id = ?
2038:          AND idempotency_key = ?
2039:          AND julianday(created_at) >= julianday(?)
2040:        ORDER BY created_at DESC
2041:        LIMIT 1`
2042:     )
2043:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey, idempotencyWindowStart)
2044:     .first<WorkspaceDeploymentRecord>();
2045: 
2046:   if (existingDeploymentByKey) {
2047:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingDeploymentByKey.request_payload_sha256)) {
2048:       throw new WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2049:     }
2050: 
2051:     const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2052:     try {
2053:       await db
2054:         .prepare(
2055:           `INSERT INTO workspace_deployment_idempotency (
2056:              id,
2057:              workspace_id,
2058:              idempotency_key,
2059:              deployment_id,
2060:              request_payload_sha256,
2061:              expires_at
2062:            )
2063:            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2064:         )
2065:         .bind(
2066:           generatePrefixedId('wdep'),
2067:           input.workspaceId,
2068:           input.idempotencyKey,
2069:           existingDeploymentByKey.id,
2070:           input.requestPayloadSha256,
2071:           expiresAt
2072:         )
2073:         .run();
2074:     } catch (error) {
2075:       if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2076:         throw error;
2077:       }
2078:     }
2079: 
2080:     return { deployment: toWorkspaceDeploymentResponse(existingDeploymentByKey), reused: true };
2081:   }
2082: 
2083:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2084:   const deploymentRecord = await db
2085:     .prepare(
2086:       `INSERT INTO workspace_deployments (
2087:          id,
2088:          workspace_id,
2089:          status,
2090:          provider,
2091:          idempotency_key,
2092:          request_payload_json,
2093:          request_payload_sha256,
2094:          max_retries,
2095:          provenance_json,
2096:          created_at,
2097:          updated_at
2098:        )
2099:        VALUES (?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
2100:        RETURNING *`
2101:     )
2102:     .bind(
2103:       input.id,
2104:       input.workspaceId,
2105:       input.provider,
2106:       input.idempotencyKey,
2107:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
2108:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
2109:       input.maxRetries,
2110:       JSON.stringify(input.provenance ?? {}),
2111:       now,
2112:       now
2113:     )
2114:     .first<WorkspaceDeploymentRecord>();
2115: 
2116:   if (!deploymentRecord) {
2117:     throw new Error('Failed to create workspace deployment');
2118:   }
2119: 
2120:   try {
2121:     await db
2122:       .prepare(
2123:         `INSERT INTO workspace_deployment_idempotency (
2124:            id,
2125:            workspace_id,
2126:            idempotency_key,
2127:            deployment_id,
2128:            request_payload_sha256,
2129:            expires_at
2130:          )
2131:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2132:       )
2133:       .bind(
2134:         generatePrefixedId('wdep'),
2135:         input.workspaceId,
2136:         input.idempotencyKey,
2137:         input.id,
2138:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
2139:         expiresAt
2140:       )
2141:       .run();
2142:   } catch (error) {
2143:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2144:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2145:       throw error;
2146:     }
2147: 
2148:     const concurrent = await db
2149:       .prepare(
2150:         `SELECT deployment_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2151:          FROM workspace_deployment_idempotency
2152:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2153:          LIMIT 1`
2154:       )
2155:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2156:       .first<{ deployment_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2157: 
2158:     if (!concurrent || concurrent.expires_at <= now) {
2159:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2160:       throw new Error('Deployment idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
2161:     }
2162: 
2163:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(concurrent.request_payload_sha256)) {
2164:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2165:       throw new WorkspaceDeploymentIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2166:     }
2167: 
2168:     const existingDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, input.workspaceId, concurrent.deployment_id);
2169:     if (!existingDeployment) {
2170:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2171:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing deployment ${concurrent.deployment_id}`);
2172:     }
2173: 
2174:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_deployments WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2175:     return { deployment: existingDeployment, reused: true };
2176:   }
2177: 
2178:   return { deployment: toWorkspaceDeploymentResponse(deploymentRecord), reused: false };
2179: }

2181: export async function getWorkspaceDeployment(

2200:   deploymentId: string

2222: export async function claimWorkspaceDeploymentForExecution(

2243: export async function updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(
2244:   db: D1Database,
2245:   deploymentId: string,
2246:   status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus,
2247:   options?: {
2248:     workspaceId?: string;
2249:     result?: unknown;
2250:     toolchain?: WorkspaceToolchainProfile | null;
2251:     dependencyCacheKey?: string | null;
2252:     dependencyCacheHit?: boolean;
2253:     remediations?: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[];
2254:     errorCode?: string | null;
2255:     errorMessage?: string | null;
2256:     sourceSnapshotSha256?: string | null;
2257:     sourceBundleKey?: string | null;
2258:     deployedUrl?: string | null;
2259:     providerDeploymentId?: string | null;
2260:     cancelRequestedAt?: string | null;
2261:     startedAt?: string | null;
2262:     finishedAt?: string | null;
2263:   }
2264: ): Promise<void> {
2265:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
2266:   const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
2267:   let explicitFinishedAt: string | null | undefined;
2268: 
2269:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
2270:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
2271:     values.push(options.startedAt);
2272:   }
2273:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
2274:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
2275:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
2276:     explicitFinishedAt = options.finishedAt;
2277:   }
2278:   if (options?.result !== undefined) {
2279:     updates.push('result_json = ?');
2280:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
2281:   }
2282:   if (options?.toolchain !== undefined) {
2283:     updates.push('toolchain_json = ?');
2284:     values.push(options.toolchain ? JSON.stringify(options.toolchain) : null);
2285:   }
2286:   if (options?.dependencyCacheKey !== undefined) {
2287:     updates.push('dependency_cache_key = ?');
2288:     values.push(options.dependencyCacheKey);
2289:   }
2290:   if (options?.dependencyCacheHit !== undefined) {
2291:     updates.push('dependency_cache_hit = ?');
2292:     values.push(options.dependencyCacheHit ? 1 : 0);
2293:   }
2294:   if (options?.remediations !== undefined) {
2295:     updates.push('remediations_json = ?');
2296:     values.push(JSON.stringify(options.remediations));
2297:   }
2298:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
2299:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
2300:     values.push(options.errorCode);
2301:   }
2302:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
2303:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
2304:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
2305:   }
2306:   if (options?.sourceSnapshotSha256 !== undefined) {
2307:     updates.push('source_snapshot_sha256 = ?');
2308:     values.push(options.sourceSnapshotSha256);
2309:   }
2310:   if (options?.sourceBundleKey !== undefined) {
2311:     updates.push('source_bundle_key = ?');
2312:     values.push(options.sourceBundleKey);
2313:   }
2314:   if (options?.deployedUrl !== undefined) {
2315:     updates.push('deployed_url = ?');
2316:     values.push(options.deployedUrl);
2317:   }
2318:   if (options?.providerDeploymentId !== undefined) {
2319:     updates.push('provider_deployment_id = ?');
2320:     values.push(options.providerDeploymentId);
2321:   }
2322:   if (options?.cancelRequestedAt !== undefined) {
2323:     updates.push('cancel_requested_at = ?');
2324:     values.push(options.cancelRequestedAt);
2325:   }
2326: 
2327:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
2328:     const finishedAtForDuration =
2329:       explicitFinishedAt && typeof explicitFinishedAt === 'string' ? explicitFinishedAt : new Date().toISOString();
2330:     if (explicitFinishedAt === undefined) {
2331:       updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
2332:       values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2333:     }
2334:     updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(?) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
2335:     values.push(finishedAtForDuration);
2336:   }
2337: 
2338:   values.push(deploymentId);
2339:   let whereClause = 'id = ?';
2340:   if (options?.workspaceId) {
2341:     whereClause += ' AND workspace_id = ?';
2342:     values.push(options.workspaceId);
2343:   }
2344:   if (status === 'running') {
2345:     whereClause += " AND status IN ('queued', 'running')";
2346:   }
2347: 
2348:   await db
2349:     .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_deployments SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE ${whereClause}`)
2350:     .bind(...values)
2351:     .run();
2352: }

2404: export async function requestWorkspaceDeploymentCancel(
2405:   db: D1Database,
2406:   workspaceId: string,
2407:   deploymentId: string
2408: ): Promise<{ deployment: WorkspaceDeploymentResponse | null; updated: boolean }> {
2409:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2410:   const queuedResult = await db
2411:     .prepare(
2412:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2413:        SET status = 'cancelled',
2414:            cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2415:            finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
2416:            error_code = NULL,
2417:            error_message = NULL,
2418:            updated_at = ?
2419:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
2420:     )
2421:     .bind(now, now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2422:     .run();
2423: 
2424:   const runningResult = await db
2425:     .prepare(
2426:       `UPDATE workspace_deployments
2427:        SET cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, ?),
2428:            updated_at = ?
2429:        WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'running' AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL`
2430:     )
2431:     .bind(now, now, deploymentId, workspaceId)
2432:     .run();
2433: 
2434:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(db, workspaceId, deploymentId);
2435: 
2436:   return {
2437:     deployment,
2438:     updated: (queuedResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0 || (runningResult.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0,
2439:   };
2440: }

2442: export async function appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(

2528: export async function createReviewRun(
2529:   db: D1Database,
2530:   input: CreateReviewRunInput
2531: ): Promise<{ review: ReviewRunResponse; reused: boolean }> {
2532:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2533:   const acceptedHashes = new Set([input.requestPayloadSha256, ...(input.requestPayloadSha256Aliases ?? [])]);
2534:   const existingIdempotency = await db
2535:     .prepare(
2536:       `SELECT review_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2537:        FROM review_run_idempotency
2538:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2539:        LIMIT 1`
2540:     )
2541:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2542:     .first<{ review_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2543: 
2544:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
2545:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256)) {
2546:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2547:     }
2548: 
2549:     const existingReview = await getReviewRun(db, existingIdempotency.review_id);
2550:     if (!existingReview) {
2551:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing review ${existingIdempotency.review_id}`);
2552:     }
2553: 
2554:     return { review: existingReview, reused: true };
2555:   }
2556: 
2557:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
2558:     await db
2559:       .prepare('DELETE FROM review_run_idempotency WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?')
2560:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2561:       .run();
2562:   }
2563: 
2564:   const idempotencyWindowStart = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2565:   const existingReviewByKey = await db
2566:     .prepare(
2567:       `SELECT *
2568:        FROM review_runs
2569:        WHERE workspace_id = ?
2570:          AND idempotency_key = ?
2571:          AND julianday(created_at) >= julianday(?)
2572:        ORDER BY created_at DESC
2573:        LIMIT 1`
2574:     )
2575:     .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey, idempotencyWindowStart)
2576:     .first<ReviewRunRecord>();
2577: 
2578:   if (existingReviewByKey) {
2579:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingReviewByKey.request_payload_sha256)) {
2580:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2581:     }
2582: 
2583:     const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2584:     try {
2585:       await db
2586:         .prepare(
2587:           `INSERT INTO review_run_idempotency (
2588:              id,
2589:              workspace_id,
2590:              idempotency_key,
2591:              review_id,
2592:              request_payload_sha256,
2593:              expires_at
2594:            )
2595:            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2596:         )
2597:         .bind(
2598:           generatePrefixedId('rvid'),
2599:           input.workspaceId,
2600:           input.idempotencyKey,
2601:           existingReviewByKey.id,
2602:           input.requestPayloadSha256,
2603:           expiresAt
2604:         )
2605:         .run();
2606:     } catch (error) {
2607:       if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2608:         throw error;
2609:       }
2610:     }
2611: 
2612:     return { review: toReviewRunResponse(existingReviewByKey), reused: true };
2613:   }
2614: 
2615:   const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2616:   const reviewRecord = await db
2617:     .prepare(
2618:       `INSERT INTO review_runs (
2619:          id,
2620:          workspace_id,
2621:          deployment_id,
2622:          target_type,
2623:          mode,
2624:          status,
2625:          idempotency_key,
2626:          request_payload_json,
2627:          request_payload_sha256,
2628:          provenance_json,
2629:          created_at,
2630:          updated_at
2631:        )
2632:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
2633:        RETURNING *`
2634:     )
2635:     .bind(
2636:       input.id,
2637:       input.workspaceId,
2638:       input.deploymentId,
2639:       input.targetType,
2640:       input.mode,
2641:       input.idempotencyKey,
2642:       JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
2643:       input.requestPayloadSha256,
2644:       JSON.stringify(input.provenance ?? {}),
2645:       now,
2646:       now
2647:     )
2648:     .first<ReviewRunRecord>();
2649: 
2650:   if (!reviewRecord) {
2651:     throw new Error('Failed to create review run');
2652:   }
2653: 
2654:   try {
2655:     await db
2656:       .prepare(
2657:         `INSERT INTO review_run_idempotency (
2658:            id,
2659:            workspace_id,
2660:            idempotency_key,
2661:            review_id,
2662:            request_payload_sha256,
2663:            expires_at
2664:          )
2665:          VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
2666:       )
2667:       .bind(
2668:         generatePrefixedId('rvid'),
2669:         input.workspaceId,
2670:         input.idempotencyKey,
2671:         input.id,
2672:         input.requestPayloadSha256,
2673:         expiresAt
2674:       )
2675:       .run();
2676:   } catch (error) {
2677:     if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
2678:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2679:       throw error;
2680:     }
2681: 
2682:     const concurrent = await db
2683:       .prepare(
2684:         `SELECT review_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2685:          FROM review_run_idempotency
2686:          WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2687:          LIMIT 1`
2688:       )
2689:       .bind(input.workspaceId, input.idempotencyKey)
2690:       .first<{ review_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2691: 
2692:     if (!concurrent || concurrent.expires_at <= now) {
2693:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2694:       throw new Error('Review idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
2695:     }
2696: 
2697:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(concurrent.request_payload_sha256)) {
2698:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2699:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey);
2700:     }
2701: 
2702:     const existingReview = await getReviewRun(db, concurrent.review_id);
2703:     if (!existingReview) {
2704:       await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2705:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing review ${concurrent.review_id}`);
2706:     }
2707: 
2708:     await db.prepare('DELETE FROM review_runs WHERE id = ?').bind(input.id).run();
2709:     return { review: existingReview, reused: true };
2710:   }
2711: 
2712:   return { review: toReviewRunResponse(reviewRecord), reused: false };
2713: }

2715: export async function getReviewRun(db: D1Database, reviewId: string): Promise<ReviewRunResponse | null> {

2717:   if (!record) {

2721:   return toReviewRunResponse(record);

2724: export async function getReviewRunByIdempotency(
2725:   db: D1Database,
2726:   workspaceId: string,
2727:   idempotencyKey: string,
2728:   requestPayloadSha256: string,
2729:   requestPayloadSha256Aliases: string[] = []
2730: ): Promise<ReviewRunResponse | null> {
2731:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2732:   const acceptedHashes = new Set([requestPayloadSha256, ...requestPayloadSha256Aliases]);
2733:   const existingIdempotency = await db
2734:     .prepare(
2735:       `SELECT review_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
2736:        FROM review_run_idempotency
2737:        WHERE workspace_id = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
2738:        LIMIT 1`
2739:     )
2740:     .bind(workspaceId, idempotencyKey)
2741:     .first<{ review_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
2742: 
2743:   if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
2744:     if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256)) {
2745:       throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(idempotencyKey);
2746:     }
2747: 
2748:     const review = await getReviewRun(db, existingIdempotency.review_id);
2749:     if (!review) {
2750:       throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing review ${existingIdempotency.review_id}`);
2751:     }
2752: 
2753:     return review;
2754:   }
2755: 
2756:   const idempotencyWindowStart = new Date(Date.now() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
2757:   const existingReview = await db
2758:     .prepare(
2759:       `SELECT *
2760:        FROM review_runs
2761:        WHERE workspace_id = ?
2762:          AND idempotency_key = ?
2763:          AND julianday(created_at) >= julianday(?)
2764:        ORDER BY created_at DESC
2765:        LIMIT 1`
2766:     )
2767:     .bind(workspaceId, idempotencyKey, idempotencyWindowStart)
2768:     .first<ReviewRunRecord>();
2769: 
2770:   if (!existingReview) {
2771:     return null;
2772:   }
2773: 
2774:   if (!acceptedHashes.has(existingReview.request_payload_sha256)) {
2775:     throw new ReviewIdempotencyConflictError(idempotencyKey);
2776:   }
2777: 
2778:   return toReviewRunResponse(existingReview);
2779: }

2801:     return {};
2802:   }

2805: export async function claimReviewRunForExecution(db: D1Database, reviewId: string): Promise<boolean> {
2806:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
2807:   const result = await db
2808:     .prepare(
2809:       `UPDATE review_runs
2810:        SET status = 'running',
2811:            started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?),
2812:            attempt_count = attempt_count + 1,
2813:            error_code = NULL,
2814:            error_message = NULL,
2815:            updated_at = ?
2816:        WHERE id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
2817:     )
2818:     .bind(now, now, reviewId)
2819:     .run();
2820: 
2821:   return (result.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0;
2822: }

2824: export async function updateReviewRunStatus(
2825:   db: D1Database,
2826:   reviewId: string,
2827:   status: ReviewRunStatus,
2828:   options?: {
2829:     report?: ReviewReport | null;
2830:     markdownSummary?: string | null;
2831:     errorCode?: string | null;
2832:     errorMessage?: string | null;
2833:     startedAt?: string | null;
2834:     finishedAt?: string | null;
2835:   }
2836: ): Promise<void> {
2837:   const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
2838:   const values: Array<string | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
2839: 
2840:   if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
2841:     updates.push('started_at = ?');
2842:     values.push(options.startedAt);
2843:   }
2844:   if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
2845:     updates.push('finished_at = ?');
2846:     values.push(options.finishedAt);
2847:   }
2848:   if (options?.report !== undefined) {
2849:     updates.push('report_json = ?');
2850:     values.push(options.report ? JSON.stringify(options.report) : null);
2851:   }
2852:   if (options?.markdownSummary !== undefined) {
2853:     updates.push('markdown_summary = ?');
2854:     values.push(options.markdownSummary);
2855:   }
2856:   if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
2857:     updates.push('error_code = ?');
2858:     values.push(options.errorCode);
2859:   }
2860:   if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
2861:     updates.push('error_message = ?');
2862:     values.push(options.errorMessage);
2863:   }
2864:   if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed' || status === 'cancelled') {
2865:     updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?)');
2866:     values.push(new Date().toISOString());
2867:   }
2868: 
2869:   values.push(reviewId);
2870:   await db.prepare(`UPDATE review_runs SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`).bind(...values).run();
2871: }

2873: export async function appendReviewEvent(

2875:   input: {
2876:     reviewId: string;

2878:     payload: unknown;
2879:   }

2883:     .bind(input.reviewId)
2884:     .first<{ last_event_seq: number }>();
2885: 
2886:   if (!seqResult) {

2888:   }
2889: 
2890:   const seq = Number(seqResult.last_event_seq);
2891:   await db
2892:     .prepare(
2893:       `INSERT INTO review_events (review_id, seq, event_type, payload_json)
2894:        VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`
2895:     )
2896:     .bind(input.reviewId, seq, input.eventType, JSON.stringify(input.payload))
2897:     .run();
2898: 
2899:   return seq;
2900: }

2914:        LIMIT ?`
2915:     )
2916:     .bind(reviewId, fromExclusive, limit)

2924:       payload = { raw: row.payload_json };

2929:       eventType: row.event_type,
2930:       payload,
2931:       createdAt: row.created_at,

3065: export async function getReviewCochangeCache(
3066:   db: D1Database,
3067:   input: {
3068:     filePath: string;
3069:     repo: string;
3070:   }
3071: ): Promise<{ cochange: Array<{ path: string; frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }>; lastUpdated: string; lookbackSessions: number } | null> {
3072:   const record = await db
3073:     .prepare(
3074:       `SELECT cochange_json, last_updated, lookback_sessions
3075:        FROM review_cochange_cache
3076:        WHERE file_path = ? AND repo = ?
3077:        LIMIT 1`
3078:     )
3079:     .bind(input.filePath, input.repo)
3080:     .first<{ cochange_json: string; last_updated: string; lookback_sessions: number }>();
3081: 
3082:   if (!record) {
3083:     return null;
3084:   }
3085: 
3086:   let cochange: Array<{ path: string; frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] }> = [];
3087:   try {
3088:     const parsed = JSON.parse(record.cochange_json) as unknown;
3089:     if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
3090:       cochange = parsed.filter((item): item is { path: string; frequency: number; sessionIds: string[] } => {
3091:         const entry = item as Record<string, unknown>;
3092:         return typeof entry.path === 'string' && typeof entry.frequency === 'number' && Array.isArray(entry.sessionIds);
3093:       });
3094:     }
3095:   } catch {
3096:     cochange = [];
3097:   }
3098: 
3099:   return {
3100:     cochange,
3101:     lastUpdated: record.last_updated,
3102:     lookbackSessions: Number(record.lookback_sessions),
3103:   };
3104: }

3198: export async function upsertWorkspaceDependencyCache(
3199:   db: D1Database,
3200:   input: {
3201:     id: string;
3202:     workspaceId: string;
3203:     cacheKey: string;
3204:     manager: WorkspacePackageManager;
3205:     managerVersion: string | null;
3206:     projectRoot: string;
3207:     lockfileName: string | null;
3208:     lockfileSha256: string | null;
3209:     artifactKey: string;
3210:     artifactSha256: string;
3211:     artifactBytes: number;
3212:   }
3213: ): Promise<void> {
3214:   const now = new Date().toISOString();
3215:   await db
3216:     .prepare(
3217:       `INSERT INTO workspace_dependency_caches (
3218:          id,
3219:          workspace_id,
3220:          cache_key,
3221:          manager,
3222:          manager_version,
3223:          project_root,
3224:          lockfile_name,
3225:          lockfile_sha256,
3226:          artifact_key,

3228:          artifact_bytes,

3266: export async function updateWorkspaceDeploymentSummary(
3267:   db: D1Database,
3268:   workspaceId: string,
3269:   input: {
3270:     deploymentId: string;
3271:     status: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus;
3272:     deployedUrl?: string | null;
3273:     deployedAt?: string | null;
3274:     errorCode?: string | null;
3275:     errorMessage?: string | null;
3276:   }
3277: ): Promise<void> {
3278:   const updates: string[] = [
3279:     'last_deployment_id = ?',
3280:     'last_deployment_status = ?',
3281:     'last_deployment_error_code = ?',
3282:     'last_deployment_error_message = ?',
3283:     'updated_at = ?',
3284:   ];
3285:   const values: Array<string | null> = [
3286:     input.deploymentId,
3287:     input.status,
3288:     input.errorCode ?? null,
3289:     input.errorMessage ?? null,
3290:     new Date().toISOString(),
3291:   ];
3292: 
3293:   if (input.deployedUrl !== undefined) {
3294:     updates.push('last_deployed_url = ?');
3295:     values.push(input.deployedUrl);
3296:   }
3297:   if (input.deployedAt !== undefined) {
3298:     updates.push('last_deployed_at = ?');
3299:     values.push(input.deployedAt);

3301: 
3302:   values.push(workspaceId);
3303:   values.push(input.deploymentId);
3304:   await db
3305:     .prepare(
3306:       `UPDATE workspaces
3307:        SET ${updates.join(', ')}
3308:        WHERE id = ?
3309:          AND EXISTS (
3310:            SELECT 1
3311:            FROM workspace_deployments candidate
3312:            LEFT JOIN workspace_deployments current ON current.id = workspaces.last_deployment_id
3313:            WHERE candidate.id = ?
3314:              AND candidate.workspace_id = workspaces.id
3315:              AND (
3316:                workspaces.last_deployment_id IS NULL
3317:                OR current.id IS NULL
3318:                OR workspaces.last_deployment_id = candidate.id
3319:                OR julianday(candidate.created_at) > julianday(current.created_at)
3320:                OR (
3321:                  julianday(candidate.created_at) = julianday(current.created_at)
3322:                  AND (current.id IS NULL OR candidate.rowid >= current.rowid)
3323:                )
3324:              )
3325:          )`
3326:     )
3327:     .bind(...values)
3328:     .run();

-- Migration: 0010_review_context_retrieval.sql
-- Description: add review context blob references and co-change cache for phase 1 retrieval

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS review_context_blobs (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    review_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    workspace_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    deployment_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    r2_key TEXT NOT NULL,
    byte_size INTEGER NOT NULL,
    estimated_tokens INTEGER NOT NULL,
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')),

    FOREIGN KEY (review_id) REFERENCES review_runs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (workspace_id) REFERENCES workspaces(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    FOREIGN KEY (deployment_id) REFERENCES workspace_deployments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_review_context_blobs_review
    ON review_context_blobs(review_id);

parts.text:
- **Medium – Co-change retrieval scales with changed file count and can quickly hit GitHub API limits.**  
  In `packages/worker/src/lib/review-runner.ts:824`, `fetchCochangeFromCheckpointBranch(...)` is called once per changed file, and each call refetches commit lists/details/content (`packages/worker/src/lib/review-runner.ts:543`). For a patch with many changed files, this multiplies requests (commits + per-commit metadata fetches) and can fail reviews with `review_context_github_api_error`/rate limiting, especially when `REVIEW_CONTEXT_GITHUB_TOKEN` is unset.  
  **Actionable fix:** fetch checkpoint commits once per review, parse touched files once, and compute co-change frequencies for all changed paths in-memory before a single cache write pass.

- **Medium – CLI now hard-fails deploys for non-GitHub remotes, even though server-side provenance accepts null `repo`.**  
  `workspaceDeployCommand` now throws if repo slug cannot be resolved to `github.com` (`packages/cli/src/commands/workspace/deploy.ts:218`). This blocks previously valid deploy flows for GitLab/self-hosted repos (or repos without `origin`) despite worker request parsing allowing `repo: null` (`packages/worker/src/api/workspace-deployments.ts:393`).  
  **Actionable fix:** either (a) degrade gracefully and send `repo: null` with a warning, or (b) gate this strict requirement behind a feature flag/review-context mode so deploy remains usable outside GitHub-backed workflows.
